title: NightVisionAlways
description: Instant Night Vision anywhere with a single press.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

This lightweight client-side mod lets you toggle Night Vision instantly with a single press of the **default key: N**. Perfect for caves, mining, underwater exploration, or any dark environment. The keybind is fully customizable in the Controls menu, so you can assign it to whatever key fits your setup. No commands, no permissions, and no serverside support needed — the effect is applied entirely on your client, meaning it works on any multiplayer server, including Realms. Enjoy clear, particle-free visibility without changing gameplay or requiring mods on the server.
